faq.question: How does Workforce OS work for Food Service & Catering companies in Baltimore?
faq.answer: Workforce OS provides automated crew dispatch, real-time worker tracking, and mobile-first tools built specifically for Food Service & Catering businesses operating in the Baltimore metro area.

faq.answer: Yes. Workforce OS includes built-in compliance tracking for MD-specific labor requirements, helping Baltimore businesses avoid violations.
